reason:
Node 1.8.4 has NO declared dependencies, yet it logically depends on several prior results:

(1) It uses the bound r² ≤ m+1 from node 1.8.3 (Energy constraints and Weis-Shirokov recovery), which establishes that extreme points of energy-constrained density operator sets have rank r satisfying r² ≤ m+1. Without this dependency, argument (a) has no foundation for the inequality r² ≤ 3.

(2) Argument (b) uses the face dimension gap of S(B(H)), relying on the definition face_dimension_gap and the Weis-Shirokov theorem (Corollary 5) which gives dim(F_K(x)) ≤ m when x is extreme in C under m constraints. This should be an explicit dependency or at minimum a reference to the definition/external.

(3) The face-commutant correspondence (face_commutant_correspondence definition) is implicitly used to connect face dimensions to rank, yet is not referenced.

Fix: Add explicit dependencies on node 1.8.3 (for the rank bound), and reference the definitions face_dimension_gap, Weis_Shirokov_theorem, and face_commutant_correspondence.
